generated_skills.name: buddy-find
generated_skills.description: Маршрутизатор пошуку: шукає в пам'яті (memory/), файлах на диску або в інтернеті через DuckDuckGo
generated_skills.purpose: Search router: receives query (sys.argv[1]) and search_type (sys.argv[2]: auto/memory/files/web). Memory search reads files from memory/ folder. File search lists files in D:/BuddyWorkspace, D:/Projects, D:/Documents. Web search uses DuckDuckGo API (api.duckduckgo.com). Auto mode picks best source based on keywords. Returns JSON results. Keep it simple - under 150 lines.
generated_skills.context: пошук в памяті, файлах або інтернеті

generated_skills.name: buddy-dev-helper
generated_skills.description: Розробницький помічник для аналізу проєктів: scaffold, deps, git-status
generated_skills.purpose: Dev helper: sys.argv[1]=action, sys.argv[2]=path. Actions: 'scaffold' returns JSON with recommended project structure for Next.js/Python/Node template. 'deps' reads package.json or requirements.txt and returns dependencies list. 'git-status' checks if path is a git repo and returns basic info. Simple, under 100 lines.
generated_skills.update_reason: Fix scaffold action: when action is 'scaffold', sys.argv[2] should be project TYPE (nextjs/python/node), NOT a path. Only 'deps' and 'git-status' require a real path. Remove the path.exists() check for scaffold action. Also fix: scaffold should accept type as sys.argv[2] directly.
